name: energy_and_fisheries_vendor_patch_harbor_ind_col
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Energy and Fisheries, the situation tagged internally around energy and fisheries vendor patch harbor ind col has converged with local pressure in the Harborline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The trade is not abstract: it is individual versus collective under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Nadia Park
agents.identity: I am Nadia Park, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Energy and Fisheries. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Nadia Kaur
agents.identity: I am Nadia Kaur, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Energy and Fisheries. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of collective.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of individual even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Nadia Park must choose under individual versus collective. What does Nadia Park do?
